results.title: Girls beat boys in Belmont Classic as Ladies Pro edges out Westbound in titanic struggle
results.description: Shaping as a match race between the best of the boys and a gloried girl, the Belmont Classic delivered a pulsating duel between Westbound and Ladies Pro with the latter gaining a narrow edge in the dying part.

results.title: Don’t Cry for me Argentina...
results.description: Roaring Hanna is a Slugger reader from Belfast Well alas for our ‘nearest and dearest’ neighbours once again the World Cup isn’t coming home, that’s this year just as it didn’t every year since ’66 and ’62, ’58, 54 & ’50 before that. You really do have to wonder at the mentality of all the little Englanders who have a sense of entitlement that they seriously believe that their team really have a chance to lift the Jules Rimet? Of ... Read more...

results.title: BWF Japan Open 2026: PV Sindhu Reaches Maiden Final To Meet Akane Yamaguchi In Title Clash
results.description: PV Sindhu reached her maiden Japan Open Super 750 final after Chen Yufei retired injured in the semifinal. The Indian star will now face reigning world champion Akane Yamaguchi as she chases her first Super 750 title ahead of the BWF World Championships. The post BWF Japan Open 2026: PV Sindhu Reaches Maiden Final To Meet Akane Yamaguchi In Title Clash appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .
